name: OptiVue
description: OptiVue is a combination of Lutemax 2020 marigold extract, European Bilberry extract and French Pine Bark extract formulated to provide optimum eye health. Lutemax 2020 is clinically proven marigold extract standardized to contain 20% lutein and 4% zeaxanthin.
benefits: Protection Against Blue Light - clinically proven to help eyes filter out blue light
Strengthens Eye Macular with optimal 5:1 ratio of lutein and zeaxanthin
Clinically Proven results in just 8 weeks
Reduces risk of age-related macular degeneration (AMD) and cataracts
who_can_consume: Adults experiencing digital eye strain, those concerned about blue light exposure, individuals at risk for age-related eye conditions.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have existing eye conditions.

qa.question: How does OptiVue help with glaucoma?
qa.answer: The combination of French Pine Bark and Bilberry promotes healthy ocular fluid pressure and may help lower intraocular pressure (IOP), reducing glaucoma risk. It may also strengthen the effect of glaucoma medication.

qa.question: How long before seeing results?
qa.answer: OptiVue is clinically proven to produce results in just 8 weeks. The product uses patented Lutemax 2020 providing all three macular carotenoids.
